title: frankenia grandifolia var. micrantha
intro: Frankenia grandifolia var. micrantha, also known as the small-fruited sea heath, is a plant species that belongs to the Frankeniaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. Frankenia grandifolia var. micrantha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of treatments.
